title: Southeast Asia Aid Map
text: InteractiveSoutheast Asia Aid MapThe Southeast Asia Aid Map data interactive tracks $290 billion in aid and development finance across 130,000 projects from 2015-2023. The dataset is the most comprehensive regional aid dataset of its kind, combining publicly available data with open source research.See the complete pictureAccess the only complete dataset on official development finance in Southeast Asia. We bring together data from dozens of sources, including partners who don't publish publicly, making it possible to understand who's funding what across the region.View Map (Opens in new window)Compare donors and prioritiesReveal patterns and compare contributions by the major players in Southeast Asia’s development. Filter by donor, recipient, sector, or time period to see how development priorities have shifted over time.Explore Data (Opens in new window)Understand any country in minutesGet comprehensive country profiles with project level granularity, that don't exist anywhere else. Each profile summarises all development finance flowing into that country, with filters for climate, gender, and disability finance to reveal what matters most to your analysis.Explore Projects (Opens in new window)World-class analysisDelivered by leading experts who specialise in Southeast Asian development and regional economics.2025 Southeast Asia Aid ReportA wave of impending aid cuts is set to hit the region hardSoutheast Asia finds itself at an uncertain moment in its development trajectory.Read Report (Opens in new window)Research in BriefAlexandre Dayant: Aid cuts put Southeast Asia's poorest countries at riskWatch NowGrace StanhopeRoland RajahExplore the Southeast Asia Aid MapEvery donor, every Southeast Asian recipient, all in the only interactive tool of its kind.Explore Map (Opens in new window)
